title: Use standard product descriptions - sheep and goats
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use standard product descriptions - sheep and goats demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify anatomical features of a sheep or goat carcase

pcs.text: Describe parts on a carcase using the anatomical direction format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe parts on a carcase using the anatomical direction format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe parts on a carcase using the anatomical direction format.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify bones relevant to meat specifications in a sheep or goat skeleton.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify relevant glands and cartilage on a sheep or goat carcase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify relevant glands and cartilage on a sheep or goat carcase.

pcs.text: Locate and identify muscles relevant to sheep or goat specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify muscles relevant to sheep or goat specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify muscles relevant to sheep or goat specifications.

elements.title: Identify and name meat products using the standard product description

pcs.text: Identify the standard sheep and goat category descriptions and their format

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the standard sheep and goat category descriptions and their format.

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace health and safety, food safety and regulatory requirements when working with carcases and meat products

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace health and safety, food safety and regulatory requirements when working with carcases and meat products.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and name meat products using the standardised description of the meat cut.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify major muscles that make up the meat product.

pcs.text: Identify correct cutting lines for each product using the anatomical terms to describe cutting lines and site procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify correct cutting lines for each product using the anatomical terms to describe cutting lines and site procedures.

pcs.text: Identify product that does not conform to product specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify product that does not conform to product specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify product that does not conform to product specification.

pcs.text: Identify changes required for any given meat product to ensure compliance with the product description

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify changes required for any given meat product to ensure compliance with the product description.
